title: "ECiP Speakers & Talks"
format:
  html:
    theme:
      - cosmo
      - brand
    css: styles.css
    toc: true



---
title: "ECiP Speakers & Talks"
format:
  html:
    theme:
      - cosmo
      - brand
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
---

# ECiP Speakers & Talks (2025–2010)

## 2025
- **Thomas Bartz-Beielstein** (IDE+A, TH Köln, Germany)
- **Richard Schulz** (IDE+A, TH Köln, Germany)

## 2024
- **Thomas Bartz-Beielstein** (IDE+A, TH Köln, Germany)
- **Richard Schulz** (IDE+A, TH Köln, Germany)
- **Danial Yazdani** (University of Technology Sydney, Australia)

## 2023
- **Thomas Bartz-Beielstein** (IDE+A, TH Köln, Germany)
- **Bogdan Filipic** (Jozef Stefan Institute, Slovenia)
- **Richard Schulz** (IDE+A, TH Köln, Germany)

## 2022
- **Thomas Bartz-Beielstein** (IDE+A, TH Köln, Germany)
- **Bogdan Filipic** (Jozef Stefan Institute, Slovenia)
- **Sowmya Chandrasekaran** (TH Köln, Germany)

## 2021
- **Thomas Bartz-Beielstein** (IDE+A, TH Köln, Germany)
- **Bogdan Filipic** (Jozef Stefan Institute, Slovenia)
- **Sowmya Chandrasekaran** (TH Köln, Germany)

## 2016
- **Thomas Bartz-Beielstein** (TH Köln, Germany): “Surrogate Model-based Optimization in Practice”
- **Maizura Mokhtar, Ian Hunt, Stephen Burns, Dave Ross**: “Optimising a Waste Heat Recovery System using Multi-Objective Evolutionary Algorithm”
- **Erik Hemberg, Ignacio Arnaldo, Una-May O’Reilly**: “Multi-Line Batch Scheduling by Similarity”
- **Abdel-Rahman Hedar, Majid Almaraashi, Alaa Abdel-Hakim**: “Granular-Based Dimension Reduction for Solar Radiation Prediction Using Adaptive Memory Programming”
- **Silvino Fernández, Pablo Valledor, Diego Díaz, Eneko Malatsetxebarria, Miguel Iglesias**: “Criticality of Response Time in the usage of Metaheuristics in Industry”
- **Silvino Fernández, Pablo Valledor**: “System demonstration, ArcelorMittal Scheduling and Tuning suite“
- **Bogdan Filipic**: “Challenges of Deploying Evolutionary Computation in Steel Industry”
- **Carlos A. Coello Coello**: “Evolutionary Multi-Objective Optimization in Real-World Applications”
- **Michael Affenzeller**: “Heuristic Optimization in Production and Logistics”
- **Anna Esparcia Alcazar**: “EC in industry: the quest for the Holy Grail – from Brain Computer Interfaces to automated testing with TESTAR”
- **Thomas Bäck**: “Intelligent Industry Solutions”
- **Felipe Campelo**: “EAs for aeronautical optimization – some results and challenges”
- **Erik Goodman**: “How to Introduce Academic-developed EC Technology to Industry”
- **Panel Discussion**: Anna Esparcia Alcazar, Thomas Bäck, Thomas Bartz-Beielstein, Felipe Campelo, Silvino Fernández, Erik Goodman, Thomas Stützle


## 2015
- *Speaker and talk information to be added. See [GECCO 2015](http://www.sigevo.org/gecco-2015)*


## 2014
- *Speaker and talk information to be added. See [GECCO 2014](http://www.sigevo.org/gecco-2014)*


## 2013
- *Speaker and talk information to be added. See [GECCO 2013](http://www.sigevo.org/gecco-2013)*


## 2012
- *Speaker and talk information to be added. See [GECCO 2012](http://www.sigevo.org/gecco-2012)*


## 2011
- *Speaker and talk information to be added. See [GECCO 2011](http://www.sigevo.org/gecco-2011)*

## 2010
- **Speakers and Talks (GECCO 2016 context, for illustration):**
  - **Thomas Bartz-Beielstein**: “Surrogate Model-based Optimization in Practice”
  - **Maizura Mokhtar, Ian Hunt, Stephen Burns, Dave Ross**: “Optimising a Waste Heat Recovery System using Multi-Objective Evolutionary Algorithm”
  - **Erik Hemberg, Ignacio Arnaldo, Una-May O’Reilly**: “Multi-Line Batch Scheduling by Similarity”
  - **Abdel-Rahman Hedar, Majid Almaraashi, Alaa Abdel-Hakim**: “Granular-Based Dimension Reduction for Solar Radiation Prediction Using Adaptive Memory Programming”
  - **Silvino Fernández, Pablo Valledor, Diego Díaz, Eneko Malatsetxebarria, Miguel Iglesias**: “Criticality of Response Time in the usage of Metaheuristics in Industry”
  - **Silvino Fernández, Pablo Valledor**: “System demonstration, ArcelorMittal Scheduling and Tuning suite“
  - **Bogdan Filipic**: “Challenges of Deploying Evolutionary Computation in Steel Industry”
  - **Carlos A. Coello Coello**: “Evolutionary Multi-Objective Optimization in Real-World Applications”
  - **Michael Affenzeller**: “Heuristic Optimization in Production and Logistics”
  - **Anna Esparcia Alcazar**: “EC in industry: the quest for the Holy Grail – from Brain Computer Interfaces to automated testing with TESTAR”
  - **Thomas Bäck**: “Intelligent Industry Solutions”
  - **Felipe Campelo**: “EAs for aeronautical optimization – some results and challenges”
  - **Erik Goodman**: “How to Introduce Academic-developed EC Technology to Industry”
  - **Panel Discussion**: Anna Esparcia Alcazar, Thomas Bäck, Thomas Bartz-Beielstein, Felipe Campelo, Silvino Fernández, Erik Goodman, Thomas Stützle

---

*For detailed talk titles and abstracts, please refer to the [official ECiP pages](https://gecco-2025.sigevo.org/EC-in-Practice) and linked archives for each year.*
